title: Fuchsia Cobblemon
description: A cobbelmon modpack with more convenience.
body:
# Fuchsia Cobblemon
"Fuchsia Cobblemon" is a fabric modpack we build to expand the official Cobblemon modpack. The modpack features quality of life improvements, performance-enhancing mods, some automation and technic mods, but also a few extras we deemed useful.

This Modpack is primarily build for our small private server, but we'd be happy if anyone else likes our additions.
